$comment: The ruleset config record (ADR-018 §4, gh #34): base names the built-in ruleset (must match the manifest's selector); config carries ONLY knobs that were already data — the badge stat-boost mapping, the field-move badge gates, the two stat-stage multiplier tables, and the high-crit move list. Absent keys fall back to the ruleset's built-in faithful defaults. formula_scripts is the Phase-6 formula hatch (ADR-028/ADR-030, gh #66): kernel name -> the script: record replacing that kernel's arithmetic behind the same RulesetFormulas interface.

badge_stat_boosts.$comment: battle stat key (atk/def/spd/spc) -> the progression flag (badge) that boosts it in battle

field_move_badges.$comment: field move -> the progression flag (badge) required to use it outside battle

accuracy_stage_multipliers.$comment: stage (-6..6, string keys) -> the MoveHitTest accuracy/evasion scale factor

formula_scripts.$comment: Phase-6 formula hatch (ADR-028/ADR-030, gh #66): kernel name -> the HatchScript record implementing it. Bound kernels replace the base ruleset's arithmetic; unbound kernels keep the base implementation. RNG-drawing kernels receive the battle's draw Callables as rand_float/rand_range/rand_int hosts — scripts control formula math, never draw order.
